description: Product Description These traditional spring-loaded Wooden Mouse Traps for indoors provide the best value, fit in all areas where needed, and are effective. Ready to use, durable, re-usable and disposable once rodents are removed from your home. With these good-quality Wooden Mouse Traps, you can effectively eliminate those dangerous pests in the shortest possible time. These Wooden Mice Traps are ideal for attics, basements, garages, sheds, and all around the home. It catches well, once it traps, there’s no way for the rodent to escape. Protects your furniture, electrical wirings, kitchen supplies and food containers from the infestation of Mice, Rats, and Rodents. These pests also spread harmful bacteria that may cause serious illness to you or your surroundings. Keep out from the reach of children. These Mouse Traps may look like ordinary toys to children - if possible, place in secure locations away from children. For use in the Pantry, Basement, Attic, Garage or Greenhouse Place in the affected room corners or shelves Put in the bait of your choosing - Test different ones Span hanger and ready to go Make sure not to touch the trap anymore Tip: Chocolate cream, peanut butter or nuts are perfect baits
